title: Who is Twin S? Rapper linked in rumours after Klaudia Glam injured in Gabrielle Carrington London crash case
summary_full: Klaudia Glam was injured in a serious London incident involving Gabrielle Carrington, who has been arrested. Police have not confirmed any death or motive yet. Rumours linking UK rapper Twin S to the fight are spreading online, but there is no official proof. Authorities continue to investigate while many claims on social media remain unverified.
